requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (ANOR NC / IEC-CISPR 14 basis)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（ANOR NC / IEC-CISPR 14基准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（ANOR NC / IEC-CISPR 14基準）

summary.en: Cameroon does not operate a stand-alone, EU-style EMC directive. The Agence des Normes et de la Qualite (ANOR) sets Cameroonian standards (Normes Camerounaises, NC) that generally adopt international IEC/CISPR references. Where an EMC requirement applies to household appliances, the relevant family standard is the IEC-CISPR 14 series (CISPR 14-1 emission, CISPR 14-2 immunity), which ANOR may adopt as an NC. Radio-frequency aspects of connected appliances (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth modules) fall under the Agence de Regulation des Telecommunications (ART) rather than ANOR. In practice, EMC compliance for a refrigerator entering Cameroon is demonstrated within the conformity-assessment file (test reports to the IEC-CISPR 14 series) reviewed under the PECAE pre-shipment programme, rather than via a separate mandatory EMC certificate. Exporters should confirm with ANOR and the appointed PECAE inspection body whether an EMC test report is required for the specific HS code.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆未实施独立的欧盟式电磁兼容指令。喀麦隆标准与质量署（ANOR）制定喀麦隆国家标准（Normes Camerounaises，NC），通常采用国际IEC/CISPR参考标准。当家用器具适用电磁兼容要求时，相关产品族标准为IEC-CISPR 14系列（CISPR 14-1发射、CISPR 14-2抗扰度），ANOR可将其采用为NC标准。联网器具的无线射频部分（Wi-Fi/蓝牙模块）由电信监管署（ART）管辖，而非ANOR。实际操作中，进入喀麦隆的电冰箱电磁兼容合规通过PECAE装运前计划审核的合格评定文件（依据IEC-CISPR 14系列的检测报告）证明，而非通过独立的强制性电磁兼容证书。出口商应与ANOR及指定的PECAE检验机构确认特定HS编码是否需要电磁兼容检测报告。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆未實施獨立的歐盟式電磁相容指令。喀麥隆標準與質量署（ANOR）制定喀麥隆國家標準（Normes Camerounaises，NC），通常採用國際IEC/CISPR參考標準。當家用器具適用電磁相容要求時，相關產品族標準為IEC-CISPR 14系列（CISPR 14-1發射、CISPR 14-2抗擾度），ANOR可將其採用為NC標準。聯網器具的無線射頻部分（Wi-Fi/藍牙模組）由電信監管署（ART）管轄，而非ANOR。實際操作中，進入喀麥隆的電冰箱電磁相容合規通過PECAE裝運前計畫審核的合格評定文件（依據IEC-CISPR 14系列的檢測報告）證明，而非通過獨立的強制性電磁相容證書。出口商應與ANOR及指定的PECAE檢驗機構確認特定HS編碼是否需要電磁相容檢測報告。

standards_or_laws: ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite) — Cameroonian national standards (Normes Camerounaises, NC), generally adopting IEC/CISPR references
IEC-CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (international basis for any NC adoption)
IEC-CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity (international basis for any NC adoption)
ART (Agence de Regulation des Telecommunications) — radio-frequency approval for connected/wireless modules (separate from ANOR EMC)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). These are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China's GB 4343 series and any ANOR NC adoption share a common CISPR 14 international root, the underlying test methodology is closely aligned, but a Chinese CCC EMC report is not automatically accepted by the Cameroon PECAE conformity-assessment body without review.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行，在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下实施。由于中国GB 4343系列与ANOR可能采用的NC标准共享CISPR 14国际根源，底层检测方法高度一致，但中国CCC电磁兼容报告未经审核不会被喀麦隆PECAE合格评定机构自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行，在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下實施。由於中國GB 4343系列與ANOR可能採用的NC標準共享CISPR 14國際根源，底層檢測方法高度一致，但中國CCC電磁相容報告未經審核不會被喀麥隆PECAE合格評定機構自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)

gap.en: Because both regimes ultimately trace to the CISPR 14 series, the technical EMC gap for refrigerators is generally small. The practical gaps are procedural: (1) Cameroon has no single mandatory EMC certificate; instead any EMC evidence is folded into the PECAE conformity-assessment dossier, so the exporter must confirm with ANOR / the PECAE inspection body whether a CISPR 14-based test report is required for the specific HS code; (2) a Chinese CCC GB 4343.1 report is acceptable as supporting evidence only after review by the PECAE body and may need to reference the IEC-CISPR designation rather than the GB number; (3) wireless-enabled (smart) refrigerators require separate ART radio approval, which is outside ANOR EMC scope. Cameroon does not impose EU-style harmonic-current or flicker limits as a standalone mandatory regime.
gap.zh: 由于两套制度最终均溯源至CISPR 14系列，电冰箱的电磁兼容技术差距一般较小。实际差距属程序性：（1）喀麦隆无单一强制性电磁兼容证书，任何电磁兼容证据均纳入PECAE合格评定档案，故出口商须与ANOR/PECAE检验机构确认特定HS编码是否需要基于CISPR 14的检测报告；（2）中国CCC GB 4343.1报告仅在经PECAE机构审核后方可作为支持性证据，且可能需引用IEC-CISPR编号而非GB编号；（3）具无线功能（智能）的电冰箱须另行取得ART无线电批准，此项不在ANOR电磁兼容范围内。喀麦隆未将欧盟式谐波电流或闪烁限值作为独立强制制度实施。
gap.zht: 由於兩套制度最終均溯源至CISPR 14系列，電冰箱的電磁相容技術差距一般較小。實際差距屬程序性：（1）喀麥隆無單一強制性電磁相容證書，任何電磁相容證據均納入PECAE合格評定檔案，故出口商須與ANOR/PECAE檢驗機構確認特定HS編碼是否需要基於CISPR 14的檢測報告；（2）中國CCC GB 4343.1報告僅在經PECAE機構審核後方可作為支持性證據，且可能需引用IEC-CISPR編號而非GB編號；（3）具無線功能（智慧）的電冰箱須另行取得ART無線電批准，此項不在ANOR電磁相容範圍內。喀麥隆未將歐盟式諧波電流或閃爍限值作為獨立強制制度實施。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — Cameroon has no stand-alone EMC directive; EMC evidence (IEC-CISPR 14 basis) is assessed within the PECAE conformity-assessment dossier where ANOR has adopted the relevant NC; confirm requirement with ANOR / PECAE body per HS code. Wireless modules require separate ART approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite, Cameroun)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cameroon has no EU-style stand-alone EMC directive. Any EMC requirement for refrigerators rests on ANOR-adopted NC standards tracing to the IEC-CISPR 14 series and is assessed within the PECAE conformity dossier. Because Chinese GB 4343.1 shares the same CISPR 14 root, the technical gap is small, but a CCC EMC report must be reviewed by the PECAE body and may need to cite IEC-CISPR designations. Wireless-enabled models need separate ART radio approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆无欧盟式独立电磁兼容指令。电冰箱的任何电磁兼容要求均基于ANOR采用的、溯源至IEC-CISPR 14系列的NC标准，并在PECAE合格评定档案内审核。由于中国GB 4343.1共享同一CISPR 14根源，技术差距较小，但CCC电磁兼容报告须经PECAE机构审核，且可能需引用IEC-CISPR编号。具无线功能的型号须另行取得ART无线电批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆無歐盟式獨立電磁相容指令。電冰箱的任何電磁相容要求均基於ANOR採用的、溯源至IEC-CISPR 14系列的NC標準，並在PECAE合格評定檔案內審核。由於中國GB 4343.1共享同一CISPR 14根源，技術差距較小，但CCC電磁相容報告須經PECAE機構審核，且可能需引用IEC-CISPR編號。具無線功能的型號須另行取得ART無線電批准。
